name: checkly
description: Checkly skills for creating, testing, and managing monitoring checks with AI coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Create and manage Checkly monitoring from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Use Checkly's agent skill to initialize monitoring-as-code projects, create API and browser checks, investigate failures, and manage account features with the Checkly CLI.
defaultPrompt: Create a Checkly browser check for this flow.
Add API monitoring for this endpoint.
